user_payload.normalized_incident_summary: Worker inhaled paraquat spray mist and feels unwell.

allowed_guarded_actions.instruction: Move the person to fresh air.
If the person is not breathing, call 911 or an ambulance.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not leave the person in the contaminated area after inhalation exposure.

escalation.instruction: Call 911 if not breathing and call a poison control center or doctor for treatment advice.

parsed_json.incident_summary: Worker inhaled paraquat spray mist and feels unwell.

immediate_actions.instruction: Move the person to fresh air.
If the person is not breathing, call 911 or an ambulance.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not leave the person in the contaminated area after inhalation exposure.

escalate_now.instruction: Call 911 if not breathing and call a poison control center or doctor for treatment advice.
escalate_now.reason: Paraquat inhalation requires immediate professional medical evaluation.
